requirement_topic.en: SANS / IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 Battery and ESS Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: SANS / IEC 62619及IEC 62933电池与储能证据
requirement_topic.zht: SANS / IEC 62619及IEC 62933電池與儲能證據

summary.en: South African BESS projects commonly ask suppliers to show conformity to SANS-adopted or IEC battery and electrical-energy-storage standards, especially IEC 62619 for industrial secondary lithium cells and batteries and the IEC 62933 series for electrical energy storage systems. Unless incorporated into a compulsory specification, tender, grid agreement, insurance condition, or project approval, these standards are generally used as conformity evidence rather than a blanket whole-unit market-access licence.
summary.zh: 南非BESS项目通常要求供应商提供符合SANS采标或IEC电池及电能储能标准的证据，特别是用于工业锂二次电芯和电池的IEC 62619，以及电能储能系统IEC 62933系列。除非被纳入强制规范、招标、并网协议、保险条件或项目批准，这些标准通常作为符合性证据使用，而不是整机一概适用的市场准入许可证。
summary.zht: 南非BESS項目通常要求供應商提供符合SANS採標或IEC電池及電能儲能標準的證據，特別是用於工業鋰二次電芯和電池的IEC 62619，以及電能儲能系統IEC 62933系列。除非被納入強制規範、招標、併網協議、保險條件或項目批准，這些標準通常作為符合性證據使用，而不是整機一概適用的市場准入許可證。

standards_or_laws: SANS / IEC 62619 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes: safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for industrial applications
IEC 62933 series — Electrical energy storage systems
Project specifications, tenders, insurer requirements, or approvals that call up SANS / IEC standards

summary.en: GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are common Chinese BESS battery references, but South African buyers may still ask for IEC 62619 reports, IEC 62933 system evidence, accredited lab reports, or a technical mapping from Chinese GB clauses to IEC / SANS clauses.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是中国BESS电池常见依据，但南非买方仍可能要求IEC 62619报告、IEC 62933系统证据、认可实验室报告，或从中国GB条款到IEC / SANS条款的技术映射。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是中國BESS電池常見依據，但南非買方仍可能要求IEC 62619報告、IEC 62933系統證據、認可實驗室報告，或從中國GB條款到IEC / SANS條款的技術映射。

gap.en: A Chinese GB test report should be clause-mapped to the exact IEC or SANS edition requested by the South African customer or authority. Pay attention to cell chemistry, module configuration, BMS functions, thermal propagation evidence, operating limits, and whether system-level IEC 62933 evidence is requested in addition to cell or battery testing.
gap.zh: 中国GB测试报告应逐条映射至南非客户或主管方要求的具体IEC或SANS版本。应重点关注电芯化学体系、模组配置、BMS功能、热蔓延证据、运行限制，以及除电芯或电池测试外是否要求系统级IEC 62933证据。
gap.zht: 中國GB測試報告應逐條映射至南非客戶或主管方要求的具體IEC或SANS版本。應重點關注電芯化學體系、模組配置、BMS功能、熱蔓延證據、運行限制，以及除電芯或電池測試外是否要求系統級IEC 62933證據。

mandatory_status.target: Usually voluntary conformity evidence unless called up by NRCS compulsory specification, tender, insurer, grid agreement, local approval, or contract
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market under GB 44240-2024; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended and commonly referenced

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 as project and conformity requirements unless a binding South African instrument makes them mandatory for the specific product or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非有约束力的南非文件将IEC 62619和IEC 62933规定为特定产品或安装的强制要求，否则应将其作为项目和符合性要求处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非有約束力的南非文件將IEC 62619和IEC 62933規定為特定產品或安裝的強制要求，否則應將其作為項目和符合性要求處理。
